message:
feat(e2e): add E2E tests for ntm logs and history commands

- Test logs command flag parsing (--limit, --panes, --since, --filter, --aggregate)
- Test robot-logs flags (--robot-logs, --logs-limit, --logs-panes)
- Test history command with filters (--limit, --session, --since, --search, --source)
- Test history subcommands (stats, clear, export)
- Test robot-history flag
- Gracefully skip when command not available in PATH version
- Follow existing patterns with TestLogger and proper teardown

Closes: bd-1l95u

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
